# Illinois Probate Directory

> A directory of 590+ verified probate attorneys across Cook, Lake, Will, Kane, McHenry, and DuPage counties, Illinois. Free to search, no registration required.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/): Full attorney search across all 6 counties
- [Cook County Attorneys](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/county/cook)
- [Lake County Attorneys](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/county/lake)
- [Will County Attorneys](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/county/will)
- [Kane County Attorneys](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/county/kane)
- [McHenry County Attorneys](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/county/mchenry)
- [DuPage County Attorneys](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/county/dupage)
- [How Probate Works in Illinois](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/resources/how-probate-works-illinois)
- [Illinois Probate Courts by County](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/resources/illinois-probate-courts-by-county)
- [Illinois Probate Timeline by County](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/resources/illinois-probate-timeline-by-county)
- [Selling Inherited Property in Illinois](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/resources/selling-inherited-property-illinois)
- [Blog](https://www.illinoisprobatedirectory.com/blog)
